title: Startup bonus
subtitle: Your initial credit to start recharging clients

banner.desc: The startup bonus covers your first client recharges. No need to claim it — it's deducted automatically when you recharge a client.

como.title: HOW IT WORKS
como.paso2: If you have bonus available, it's deducted automatically
como.paso3: You earn a 10% commission on each recharge
como.paso4: When the bonus runs out, everything comes from your VIBRRA credit
